ORDER RE PETITION TO VACATE ARBITRATION AWARD

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER RONALD SILBERSTEIN'S MOTION ON PETITION TO VACATE ARBITRATION AWARD. THE COURT MODIFIES THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: RONALD SILBERSTEIN PETITIONS "TO VACATE THE CORRECTED INTERIM ARBITRATION AWARD ISSUED ON NOVEMBER 19, 2018." HOWEVER, COURTS MAY REVIEW ONLY FINAL ARBITRATION AWARDS, WHICH THIS AWARD IS NOT. (MAPLEBEAR, INC. V. BUSICK (2018) 26 CAL.APP.5TH 394, 407; CCP 1283.4.) THE PETITION IS DISMISSED. ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO CSR# 8600 EMAIL: MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM

Notice Of Motion And Motion On Petition To Vacate Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Mar-29-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Frank Cialone, Esq., Shartsis Friese LLP, 415-421-6500, appearing for Defendant, Harold Brandel el al;
No other appearance.

The Court modifies the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER RONALD SILBERSTEIN'S Motion On Petition To Vacate Arbitration Award.

Ronald Silberstein petitions "to vacate the Corrected Interim Arbitration Award issued on November 19, 2018." However, courts may review only final arbitration awards, which this award is not. (Maplebear, Inc. v. Busick (2018) 26 Cal.App.5th 394, 407; CCP 1283.4.) The petition is dismissed.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600 email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)
